steps.title: Distribute the fraction
steps.content:
Rewrite the equation so the $x$ terms are easy to combine.
$$y=\frac{1}{4}(25x+17)+8x=\frac{25x}{4}+\frac{17}{4}+8x$$

steps.title: Combine the x terms
steps.content: Write $8x$ with denominator $4$, then add the coefficients of $x$. $$8x=\frac{32x}{4}$$ $$\frac{25x}{4}+\frac{32x}{4}=\frac{57x}{4}$$ Since $\frac{57}{4}=14.25$, this is the slope. The answer is 14.25.
